title: Amtech G1530 400mm (16") x 100mm (4") Finishing trowel
features: DURABLE AND COMFORTABLE TO USE: This 400mm (16") x 100mm (4") finishing trowel has a polished steel blade and soft grip handle for ease of use
STEEL BODY: Durable construction provides strength for long-term performance
SIZE CAPACITY: 16 inch / 4 inch / 10 cm / 400 mm / 100 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning Always follow manufacturer's instructions for safe use. Keep away from children. Do not use for purposes other than intended. Store in a dry place when not in use.
